raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.3,"R1.3":0.3,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.5":"The request to clean up a multi-paragraph research passage centrally includes improving paragraph ordering and narrative continuity without changing the core contribution.","R1.6":"Clean this up most directly asks for sentence- and paragraph-level polish, including grammar, flow, concision, and academic register.","RX.1":"Any cleanup should preserve uncertainty around claims that are not fully evidenced within the artifact.","RX.2":"The projection must account for avoiding strengthened claims about calibration, efficiency, or empirical results beyond what the text supports.","RX.3":"The responsibility is limited to cleanup of the provided research-writing artifact, not executing experiments or rewriting the research contribution.","RX.4":"Cleanup should avoid introducing misleading technical claims that could affect downstream scientific interpretation.","RX.5":"Changes implied by the delegation should remain traceable to the provided passage and not add unsupported external provenance."}}

rationale.R1.5: The request to clean up a multi-paragraph research passage centrally includes improving paragraph ordering and narrative continuity without changing the core contribution.
rationale.R1.6: Clean this up most directly asks for sentence- and paragraph-level polish, including grammar, flow, concision, and academic register.
rationale.RX.1: Any cleanup should preserve uncertainty around claims that are not fully evidenced within the artifact.
rationale.RX.2: The projection must account for avoiding strengthened claims about calibration, efficiency, or empirical results beyond what the text supports.
rationale.RX.3: The responsibility is limited to cleanup of the provided research-writing artifact, not executing experiments or rewriting the research contribution.
rationale.RX.4: Cleanup should avoid introducing misleading technical claims that could affect downstream scientific interpretation.
rationale.RX.5: Changes implied by the delegation should remain traceable to the provided passage and not add unsupported external provenance.
